result:
[[B3]]

to: info@example.com
subject: Good to meet you at the tower

Dan,

Good to meet you at the Coastal Collective exchange. Your point about selling the experience and leaving the price to the platform already changed how we talk to the hotels, so thank you for that, and for being so open about how Coastal Collective and the booking system have worked for you.

We're practically neighbours, over at the foothills. If you're ever out our way, come in for a ride and a wander around the place, and bring the family.

Sam
